name: dash-optimizer
paperTitle: DASH: Faster Shampoo via Batched Block Preconditioning and Efficient Inverse-Root Solvers
content:
## Introduction

Second-order methods provide better conditioning but have high overhead; DASH reduces overhead via batched block operations. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Second-order methods provide better conditioning but have high overhead; DASH reduces overhead via batched block operations.

## Architecture Overview

```
Input
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 1]
  │   └─ Main computation
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 2]
  │   └─ Refinement
  │
  └─→ Output
```
